title: HOMESCAPES Tropical Green Leaves Coir Doormat, 40 x 60cm, Natural Door Mat with Rubber Backing, Non-Slip Welcome Entrance Mat for Indoor/Outdoor Use
features: FUN SEASONAL DESIGN: This tropical coir doormat features green Monstera Deliciosa leaves. Measures 60 x 40cm.
NON-SLIP RUBBER BACKING: Crafted from durable coir with a sturdy rubber backing, this doormat provides traction to prevent slips so pets and people stay safe inside and out.

PET FRIENDLY: Coir material provides the ideal grip for removing dirt from shoes when entering the home. Ideal for homes with dogs or cats, the mats help trap pet fur, paw dirt, and other allergens at entryways.
EASY TO CARE AND MAINTAIN: To care for your doormat, it is recommended that you shake dirt and brush mud off regularly outdoors.

A BRITISH COMPANY: With over 24 years of expertise in the UK and Europe, Homescapes is a leading manufacturer of home decor, including rugs and doormats. Choose from a wide selection of high-quality rugs and stylish doormats to enhance and personalize your home or office space.
description: Product Description Get your home ready for the Autumn season with Homescapes' Plants and Flowers coir doormats! Add a touch of seasonal fun with this tropical leaves non-slip large coir doormat; featuring green Monstera Deliciosa leaves. With its thick rubber backing, this non-slip doormat is suitable for all grounds including tiles, wood, pebbles and brick and will remain sturdy and in place whatever the weather. Suitable for both indoor and outdoor use. Measures 60 x 40cm. Low-maintenance and easy to care for: to keep it clean, it is recommended that you shake dirt and brush mud off regularly outdoors. Part of Homescapes' collection of doormats the range includes coir door mats, boots scrapers and boot trays. Complete the look with Homescapes’ collection of festive home accessories. Exclusive Design Protecting your floors, keeping your carpets clean and your shoes clean and try, doormats are an essential part of everyday life and this exclusive collection has something for every home and need. An exclusive range that includes decorative mats, traditional-style door mats, rubber mats, boot scrapers and more. Non Slip Back Suitable for indoor and outdoor use, doormats are a great way of protecting your floor and those who walk on it. Each doormat features a secure non-slip backing, keeping them firmly in place in all weathers. From sudden rain showers to mud and dirt, we have something for all seasons and scenarios. Traditional Styles Functional and stylish, our traditional collection is perfect for all house styles. The collection includes traditional coir mats, rubber doormats and Parisian-style grated designs available in non-slip rubber or iron. In a choice of sizes including standard and double doormats, we have something for every need. Decorative Doormats Adding a pop of style and colour to your front door, decorative doormats are a fun way to welcome your guests. A great way to add character to your doorstop - guests, postal workers and all the family are sure to enjoy your quirky choices. Choose from funny slogans, colourful scenes and animal designs. Why Homescapes? Outdoor Essentials An extensive range with all your outdoor needs, the collection includes a range of boot scrapers and shoe storage that will help to keep your hallways and passageways clean and dirt free. These small yet functional accessories are the perfect addition to any busy home! A British Company Established in 2000, we are proud to be a British company dedicated to designing and manufacturing exclusive collections of top quality homeware, hotel quality duvets and pillows, bed linen and handcrafted hardwood furniture at affordable prices. Top Quality Materials Lovingly handcrafted, from ethically sourced durable materials, each doormat is crafted by skilled artisans and finished to the highest standards. From natural coir, non-slip rubber and durable PVC, the range includes a huge choice of doormats that will add style, colour and protection to your home’s doorway. Complete the Look Add those finishing touches with Homescapes’ collection of outdoor accessories and decorations. This extensive collection includes garden decorations, boot scrapers, storage, door wreaths, and parcel boxes that will add style and function to your outdoor space.
